name: fridgeshare
description: Self-hosted virtual fridge board for sharing notes, photos, and magnets with your household
author: Nacho Labs LLC

scripts.check: node --check core/board-state.js && node --check apps/selfhost/board-directory-store.js && node --check apps/selfhost/file-board-store.js && node --check apps/selfhost/file-image-store.js && node --check apps/selfhost/server.js && node --check src/app-selfhost.js && node --check src/fridge-items.js && node --check src/fridge-themes.js && node --check src/fridge-storage.js && node --check src/fridge-canvas.js && node --check src/app-local.js && node --check src/app-fridge.js && node --check server/index.js && node --test test/*.test.js
